headline: A New Chapter for Thunder Ridge
subheadline: Same track. Stronger foundation. Racing that's worth the drive.
story:
Thunder Ridge Speedway has been a fixture of Hudson Valley motorsport for decades. Saturday nights at the ridge are where local drivers sharpen their skills, families fill the grandstands, and the kind of close, hard-fought racing you can't find anywhere else plays out under the lights. That legacy matters to us — it's why we're here.

Under new ownership, Thunder Ridge is being run with a clear commitment: make the on-track product as good as it can be. That means enforcing rules consistently, investing in the facility, and treating every driver and every fan with respect. We're not reinventing what made this place worth showing up to — we're protecting it and building on it.

We're excited for the 2026 season and grateful for the community that's stuck with this track through the years. Come out, bring someone new, and see what Thunder Ridge looks like with fresh energy behind it.
ownerMessage: We took on Thunder Ridge because we believe in what local short-track racing means to this community. Our job is to run a clean, fair, exciting program every race night — and to earn your trust by doing exactly that, week after week.

values.title: Fair Competition
values.description: Rules are enforced consistently, tech is run straight, and every driver competes on the same terms. No exceptions.

values.title: Safety First
values.description: Driver safety and fan safety are non-negotiable. We maintain the track, the equipment, and the procedures to back that up.

values.title: Real Racing
values.description: We put five competitive divisions on the track because local motorsport is best when the card is full and the competition is genuine.

values.title: Community
values.description: Thunder Ridge belongs to the Hudson Valley. We're here to serve drivers, families, and fans who make Saturday nights at the track worth having.

metaDescription: Thunder Ridge Speedway is under new ownership and committed to fair competition, great racing, and a revitalized experience for Hudson Valley motorsport fans.
